title: Kallil Aadum Lyrics Anandha Thaandavam Song lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kalli Aadum
Music: GV Prakash
Lyrics :  Vairamuthu
Singer: BennyDayal, Swetha

Kallil Aadum theeve siru kalagak kaara poove
Kannaal vaarthaai sonnal yen kavidhi seval koovu

pakkam neeyum vandhaal yen paruvak kaatre maarum
yennai neengi sendraal yen ilamai kaaichal yerum

pookalukku un kaaichal yellaam nervadhillai
onunnaku nerdhathelaam panne neyil yen illai

hey

adadaa udal yenbadhu kaamam uyir yenbadhu kaadhal
yidhuthaan un theydal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kallil Aadum?

The song is a romantic melody that explores themes of love and longing.

Who are the singers of Kallil Aadum?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and Swetha.

Who composed the music for Aanandha Thandavam?

The music was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

What is the release year of Aanandha Thandavam?

The movie was released in 2009.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song enhances the romantic narrative of the film, highlighting the emotional connection between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kallil Aadum is a romantic duet from the movie Aanandha Thandavam, capturing the tender emotions of love and longing. Sung by Benny Dayal and Swetha, the song features poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu and a soothing melody by GV Prakash Kumar. It beautifully portrays the emotional journey of the characters, making it a perfect accompaniment to the film's romantic storyline. The song evokes a sense of warmth and affection, ideal for moments of reflection and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kallil Aadum from the movie Aanandha Thandavam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the soulful voices of Benny Dayal and Swetha, combined with Vairamuthu's poetic lyrics and GV Prakash Kumar's soothing composition, this song is a true delight for music lovers. Dive into a world of love and emotion with this enchanting melody.
stanzaMeanings: The flame dancing on the stone, little rebellious flower. When you speak with your eyes, why does my fate cry out?
When you come near, my youthful breeze changes. If you leave me, my youthful fever rises.
For flowers, your fever is not a problem. For you, there is no butter in the milk.
The flame dancing on the stone, little rebellious flower. When you speak with your eyes, why does my fate cry out?
When you come near, my youthful breeze changes. If you leave me, my youthful fever rises.
In the country of the body, hormones are in chaos. My love, even seeing your eyes, I can't see.
Oh .. oh oho oh...
Oh dear, the body is desire, life is love. This is your search.
Love, life is my search, the body is my sulking.
The flame dancing on the stone, little rebellious flower. When you speak with your eyes, why does my fate cry out?
When you come near, my youthful breeze changes. If you leave me, my youthful fever rises.
In the excitement of nature, buds bloom on the branch. The wind of youth opens the door of the bud.
Oh dear, what you say is poetry, it bathes the ears, it rocks the mind.
ohoooooh
The moon is my loneliness, you are emptiness, we are happiness.
The flame dancing on the stone, little rebellious flower. When you speak with your eyes, why does my fate cry out?
When you come near, my youthful breeze changes. If you leave me, my youthful fever rises.
